title: Identify the applicable legal baseline
description: Use the official legal text to identify the baseline for long-term residence status before relying on assumptions.
description_ru: Используйте официальный текст закона, чтобы определить основу для долгосрочного статуса проживания.
document_note: Identity and residence-history records are typically requested; confirm the exact list in the current procedure.
cost_note: Official fee amounts must be checked in the current filing procedure.
timing_note: Processing time depends on the current procedure and filing channel.

title: Verify the current procedure and document package
title_ru: Проверьте актуальную процедуру и пакет документов
description: The legal baseline does not by itself list the exact current filing package; verify separately.
description_ru: Правовая основа сама по себе не определяет точный пакет подачи; проверяйте отдельно.
document_note: Confirm the current document package with the filing authority before submission.

title: Review tax and banking implications separately
title_ru: Отдельно проверьте налоговые и банковские последствия
description: Residence status does not by itself answer tax or banking questions; use the tax authority source separately.
description_ru: Статус проживания сам по себе не отвечает на налоговые или банковские вопросы; проверяйте отдельно.

title: Confirm the current temporary residence procedure
description: Review the official procedure page before assuming any specific requirement or timeline.
description_ru: Проверьте официальную страницу процедуры до выводов о требованиях или сроках.
document_note: Identity document and civil-status records are typically requested; confirm the exact list in the official procedure.
cost_note: Procedure fees must be checked on the official page; this checklist does not state a fixed amount.
timing_note: Processing time depends on the current procedure and case load; verify before planning travel.

title: Prepare and legalise supporting documents
description: Foreign-issued documents typically need translation and/or apostille before filing.
description_ru: Иностранные документы обычно требуют перевода и/или апостиля до подачи.
document_note: Check whether a certified Spanish translation is required for each document.
cost_note: Translation and legalisation costs vary by document and provider.

title: File the application and track its status
title_ru: Подайте заявление и отслеживайте его статус
description: Submit the completed package through the official channel and keep the filing receipt.
description_ru: Подайте полный пакет через официальный канал и сохраните расписку о подаче.
timing_note: Renewal or follow-up deadlines depend on the granted status; verify in the current procedure.

title: Verify the residence-period signal before filing
title_ru: Проверьте сигнал о сроке проживания до подачи
description: Use the official nationality and entry-requirements source to check the residence-period signal.
description_ru: Используйте официальный источник по гражданству и требованиям въезда для проверки срока проживания.
document_note: Residence and civil-status records are typically requested; confirm the exact list with the competent authority.
cost_note: Court or filing fees must be verified with the competent authority.
timing_note: Processing time is case-specific and not derived from this checklist alone.

title: Consult a qualified professional before filing
description: Citizenship eligibility must be reviewed case by case; this checklist is not a substitute for legal advice.
description_ru: Право на гражданство нужно проверять индивидуально; чек-лист не заменяет юридическую консультацию.

title: Confirm the current DNM residence category
title_ru: Уточните актуальную категорию проживания по DNM
description: Review the DNM procedure page to identify the applicable residence category before filing.
description_ru: Проверьте страницу процедуры DNM, чтобы определить применимую категорию проживания.
document_note: Identity document and entry records are typically requested; confirm the exact list with DNM.
cost_note: Procedure fees must be checked with DNM; this checklist does not state a fixed amount.
timing_note: Processing time depends on the current DNM procedure; verify before planning travel.

title: Prepare and legalise supporting documents
description: Foreign-issued documents typically need translation and/or apostille before filing with DNM.
description_ru: Иностранные документы обычно требуют перевода и/или апостиля до подачи в DNM.
document_note: Check whether a certified Spanish translation is required for each document.
cost_note: Translation and legalisation costs vary by document and provider.

title: File with DNM and track the resolution
title_ru: Подайте заявление в DNM и отслеживайте решение
description: Submit the completed package through the official DNM channel and keep the filing receipt.
description_ru: Подайте полный пакет через официальный канал DNM и сохраните расписку о подаче.
timing_note: Renewal or follow-up deadlines depend on the granted category; verify with DNM.
